description_long: This object is a vintage-style radio receiver with a rectangular, rounded wooden body and a glossy, dark brown finish. The front panel features a large, cream-colored speaker grille on the left, a circular frequency dial with a transparent cover and red markings on the right, and three metallic control knobs below the dial. The word 'Radio' is inscribed in a retro script on the lower left of the front panel, and the brand 'Zenith' is visible within the frequency dial. A sturdy, curved handle made of metal and wood arches over the top, attached to both sides for portability. The sides and back are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the rich wood grain texture, while the overall design evokes a mid-20th-century aesthetic.
description: A vintage wooden radio receiver with a large frequency dial, three control knobs, a cream speaker grille, and a curved handle. The front features the 'Zenith' brand and retro styling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the speaker grille, frequency dial with 'Zenith' branding, three control knobs, and the 'Radio' inscription.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the curved handle attachment and a single round knob, with the smooth wooden surface visible.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the plain, glossy wooden back and the arching handle, with no visible controls or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the handle attachment and round knob on the smooth wooden surface.
